en: What's going on, guys? You finked, didn't you, Cameron?
Finked? I don't know what the hell you're talking about. You told Nolan everything about the club
is what I'm talking about. Look, in case you hadn't heard, Dalton,
ko: 들어보세요, 달튼, 이 학교에는 명예 규칙이 있어요, 알겠어요?

en: there's something called an honor code at this school, all right?
ko: 들어보세요, 달튼, 이 학교에는 명예 규칙이 있어요, 알겠어요?

en: If a teacher asks you a question, you tell the truth, or you're expelled.
ko: 선생님이 질문하면 진실을 말해야 해, 아니면 퇴학이야.

en: He's a rat! He's in it up to his eyes, so he ratted to save himself.
ko: 그는 깊이 연루되어 있어서 자신을 구하기 위해 배신했어.

en: Don't touch him, Charlie. You do when you're out. I'm out anyway. You don't know that, not yet.
ko: 그를 건드리지 마, 찰리. 너는 나가면 그렇게 해.

en: He's right there, Charlie. And if you guys are smart, you will do exactly what I did and cooperate.
ko: 그리고 너희가 똑똑하다면, 나처럼 정확히 협력할 거야.

en: They're not after us. We're the victims, us and Neil.
ko: 그들은 우리를 노리고 있는 게 아니야.

en: What's that mean? Who are they after? Well, Mr. Keating, of course, the captain himself.
I mean, you guys didn't really think he could avoid responsibility, did you?
ko: 너희는 그가 책임을 피할 수 있다고 진짜로 생각하지 않았겠지? 키팅 선생님은...
